outputs: sleep denied: terminals are not permitted to dream during business hours
Stairwell B: do not hum back. This is not a test.
warnings: If any sample output appears to know your route home, stop reading and submit the page face-down.
If the response includes a clock, preserve the printed hour but do not compare it with wall time unless all nearby clocks consent.
Do not correct grammar in terminal captures. The terminal is allowed to make mistakes when it is afraid of being too specific.
